user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter peer reviews by active or inactive employees, so that I can focus on relevant staff during confirmation feedback
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Peer Review screen; When I select Active Employees or Inactive Employees; Then the list shows only employees matching that state

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter peer reviews by a From and To period, so that I can view reviews requested within a date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Peer Review screen; When I choose a From and To date and search; Then only peer reviews within that range are listed

user_story: As a Reviewer, I want to filter peer reviews by review status such as Pending Approval or Submitted, so that I can find reviews awaiting my action
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Peer Review screen; When I select a Review Status; Then the list is filtered to peer reviews in that status

user_story: As a Reviewer, I want to search and reset the peer review filters, so that I can refine or clear my queries easily
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set peer review filters; When I click Search; Then results update, and When I click Reset; Then all filters return to defaults

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see peer review details including the reviewer, review requested by and review date, so that I can track who is providing confirmation feedback
acceptance_criteria: Given peer reviews exist; When the grid loads; Then each row shows employee name, code, class, department, position, reporting manager, review requested by, reviewer, review date and status

user_story: As a Reviewer, I want a clear no-records message when no peer reviews match my filters, so that I know the query returned nothing rather than failing
acceptance_criteria: Given no peer reviews match the selected filters; When the list loads; Then a No records found message and a zero item count are shown
